MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der stated that he needs a little more time, that he is talking with the family about terminating the Trust, that Selena (Beneficiary) is attending her first year of college and enjoying her life, and that there are no medical claims. The accounting status hearing was continued to August 20, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Mr. Der stated that the Beneficiary is receiving minimul benefits, that everything is taken care of by the adopted Mother and that the Beneficiary will qualify for public benefits when she reaches eighteen. The Court approved the accounting petition (order for the same signed in open Court).
